/work/my-app/.grimoire/grimoire.toml

Options

Default registry
Registry used when an artifact reference names no registry. Overridden by the --registry flag or GRIM_DEFAULT_REGISTRY environment variable when set. Falls back to ghcr.io/grimoire-rs when this key, --registry, and GRIM_DEFAULT_REGISTRY are all unset.
Not set — the registry precedence chain decides.
ClientsSaving…
Determines which clients receive installs and updates when --client is absent. Auto-detects clients when left empty, falling back to claude.
Not set — clients are auto-detected, falling back to claude.
Show deprecated
Controls whether deprecated artifacts appear in grim search and the TUI catalog. Hidden by default unless already installed.
Default: false

TUI

Default view
Sets the view the browser opens in. Defaults to flat; tree groups items by path segments.
Default: flat
Group by type
Controls whether a type-level group (skill, rule, agent, or bundle) appears between the registry root and path segments in tree view. Disabled by default.
Default: false
Tree separators
Sets the characters that split the repository path into nested groups in tree view. Defaults to /; each entry must be a single character.
/
Rejected by grim: separator must be a single character — "--" was not applied. Restored last saved value.
Default: /
Expand levelsReloaded from disk
Sets how many levels of the grouped tree are expanded when the browser opens. Defaults to 1 (registry roots only); 0 expands the tree fully.
Default: 1
Mystery setting
A future config key this build does not know how to render a control for yet.
#ff0000
Not set.

Registries

Registries configured in this scope. Aliases can be used in place of full references.

ALIASTYPELOCATORDEFAULT
ghcrOCIghcr.io/grimoire-rs
internalINDEXhttps://index.acme.io/index.json
(no alias)OCIghcr.io/legacy-org
Legacy entry has no alias — add one by editing grimoire.toml directly.
